text: ॐṁṁ shri paramaṭṁ nenaṁ aha Ṣhātratī yodhyāyaha karma-yogaḥ arjuna-uvācya jaya-si-cet karma-anaste matā buddhir janārdana tattkim karmaṇi gore mām niyo jaya-si keśava yāmiśreṇe vavāk yena buddhimmo hayasi vame tade kam vadanishchitya yenaśre yo ha maapnuyāṁ Ṣrī bhagavanu vāj lo ke smindri vidhāniṣṭhā purāp proktā mayānāgha njānayo gena sāṅkhya nām karma-yoga nayo gena nām nakarmanā manārambhād naiśkarmyam puruṣoṣṇute nachasanyasa nādeva siddhim samadhi gachati nahi kashchit kṣana mape jātūtashthatya karma-kreti kāryate yavasak karma-a sarvav prakrate jayar gona hi karma-indriyāni samyamya ya āste manasā smaran indriyārthān vi mūdhātmā mithyācāra sa ujjya te yastvindriyāni manasa ni yambhya ravhate juna karma-indriyākh karma-yogam asaktasavīśaṣyate ni yatam kuru karma-tvam karma-jya yohya karma-naha sharīra yātra pi chate na prasiddhied karma-naha yajñārthāt karma-none yatra loko yam karma-bandhana-ha tādartham karma-kārmākāun te yā mūktasangas samācara sāhyajñāf prajās rāśtvā purovā ca prajāpati hi āne na prasavīśyad dhvam eśavost vishta kāmadhuk devān bhāvayatā ne na te devā bhāvayantu vāha parasparam bhāvayantahā śreyaf param avāpsyatha ṣṭān bhogaṇ hi vodevāha dās yante yajñābhāvitaḥ tairdhātā na pradāyaibhyaḥ yobhung teṣṭe na evasah yajñāś iṣṭāśi na santaḥ mūc yante sarva kil beshai hi bhunjate te tva gham pa pa ha ye pa chantyātma kārnāt ānāt bhavanti bhūtāni parjanyā danna sambhavah yajñāt bhavati parjanyā ha yajñākh karma samud bhavah karma brahm hod bhavam viddhi brahmākṣarasa mudbhavam tasmāt sarva gatam brahmā nityam yajñā prateśthitam evam pravartitam cakram nānuvartayati ha yajñākh agha yurindriyā rāmāha mō gham pa arthas ajīvati yastvāt marati re vasyāt ātmatriptas ca mānavah ātman ye vachas anthush taha tasyakāryam na viddhya te naiva tasyakrite nārthaha nākrte ne ha kashchana nachās yasarva bhūtēshu kashchidarthav vyapāśrayaha tasmāt asaktas satatam kārjam karma samācara asaktoh yācaran karma parama apnoti pūrushah karma nai vahi sam siddhim āsthita jan kādaya ha lokasangraha me vāpi sampaśyan kartu marhasi yajñāt ācara tishreṣṭha ha tattade veta ro jan ha sa yad pramanam kurute lokas tadanuvartate name pārthāstikarthav yam trushu lokeshu kīngchana nānavāptama vāptav yam vartā eva chakarmani yadihya hamna vartēya jātukar mannyatandrita ha māma vartmanuvartante manuśyāv pārthasarvaśah ha utsi deyuri me lokāha nakuryāṁ karma jedaḥṃ sankar asya chakarthāśyāṁ upahanyāmi māf prajāha saktaḥ karmañya vidvāṁ sahā yatha kurvanti bārata kurjād vidvāṁ statha saktaḥ chikir shurloka sangraham nā buddhi vedam janayet ājñā nāam karma sangināṁ josha yet sarva karmaṇi vidvāṁ yuk tassam ācaran prakṛtekh kriyamanāni gunaykh karmaṇi sarvaśah āhankāravi mūdhātmā kartāham iti mannyate tattva vidtum aha bhāho gunakarmavi bhāgayoho gunā guneshu vartante iti matvāna sajjate prakṛteh guna sammūdhāha sajjante guna karma su tāna krītsna vidomandaṁ krītsna vinnavi cālayet māyisarvaṇi karmaṇi san yas yādhyātmā chetasa nirāśir nirmamo bhūtvā yodhyasvavigata jvarah jyēme matamidam nityam ānūtashthanti mānavāha śraddhā vantona suyantaha mūchi ante te pikarma bhi hi yētve tadabhyasu yantaha nānūtashthanti mēmatam sarva gnyāna vi mūdhām stāna vidhīnaśtāna chetasa ha sādrīśam cēṣṭate svasyāha prakṛteh gnyāna vāna pe prakṛteṁ yānti bhūtāni nigrahaḥ kim kārśyati indriyasi yendriyasi yārthe rāgad dveshau vyavasthitau tayo navaśa māgat chet tau hi yasya paripanti nau śreyān svadharmo vīgunaha paradhar māt svanshthītāt svadharmenidha namśreyāha paradhar mo bhayāvaha arjuna uvājā atha kena prayukto yam pāpam carati pūrushaha ani channa pivārśneya balādivani yōjitaha śrī bhagavānuvāj kāma eśakro dhā eśaha rājogunasa mudhavaha mahāśanomāha pāpāma vidhienami havairenam dhume nāvriyate van hi hi yathā darshom alena ca yathol benavrto garbha tathā te nedam āvratam āvratam nyanamete na nyaninonitya vairina kāma rūpena kaunteya dhushpūrenā na lenaccha indriyāṇi mano buddhi he asyādheśthā na mūcchīyate etair vimohayateśaha nyanam āvratya dehinam tasmātva mindriyānyādau niyam yabharatarshabhā pāpāmanam prajahi yenam njāna vidhnyāna nāśanam indriyāni parānyāho ho indriye bhyaf paramanah manasastu para buddhi he yobuddhev paratastu sahā evam buddhev param buddhvā samstabhyātmā namātmāna jaiṣatrum māhābāho kāma rūpaṁ durāsadam om tatsaditi śrīmad bhagavadgītāsu upanishatsu brahmāvidhya yā yoga śāstra śrī krṣṇārjuna samvāde karma yoga nāmā trti yodhyāyāha

segments.text: ॐṁṁ shri paramaṭṁ nenaṁ aha Ṣhātratī yodhyāyaha karma-yogaḥ arjuna-uvācya jaya-si-cet karma-anaste
matā buddhir janārdana tattkim karmaṇi gore mām niyo jaya-si keśava yāmiśreṇe vavāk yena buddhimmo hayasi vame tade kam vadanishchitya yenaśre yo ha maapnuyāṁ
Ṣrī bhagavanu vāj lo ke smindri vidhāniṣṭhā purāp proktā mayānāgha njānayo gena sāṅkhya nām karma-yoga nayo gena nām nakarmanā manārambhād
naiśkarmyam puruṣoṣṇute nachasanyasa nādeva siddhim samadhi gachati nahi kashchit kṣana mape jātūtashthatya karma-kreti kāryate yavasak karma-a
sarvav prakrate jayar gona hi karma-indriyāni samyamya ya āste manasā smaran indriyārthān vi mūdhātmā mithyācāra sa ujjya te yastvindriyāni manasa
ni yambhya ravhate juna karma-indriyākh karma-yogam asaktasavīśaṣyate ni yatam kuru karma-tvam karma-jya yohya karma-naha
sharīra yātra pi chate na prasiddhied karma-naha yajñārthāt karma-none yatra loko yam karma-bandhana-ha tādartham karma-kārmākāun te yā mūktasangas samācara sāhyajñāf prajās rāśtvā
purovā ca prajāpati hi āne na prasavīśyad dhvam eśavost vishta kāmadhuk devān bhāvayatā ne na te devā bhāvayantu vāha parasparam bhāvayantahā
śreyaf param avāpsyatha ṣṭān bhogaṇ hi vodevāha dās yante yajñābhāvitaḥ tairdhātā na pradāyaibhyaḥ yobhung teṣṭe na evasah yajñāś iṣṭāśi na santaḥ
mūc yante sarva kil beshai hi bhunjate te tva gham pa pa ha ye pa chantyātma kārnāt ānāt bhavanti bhūtāni parjanyā danna sambhavah yajñāt bhavati parjanyā ha yajñākh karma samud bhavah
karma brahm hod bhavam viddhi brahmākṣarasa mudbhavam tasmāt sarva gatam brahmā nityam yajñā prateśthitam evam pravartitam cakram nānuvartayati ha yajñākh agha yurindriyā rāmāha
mō gham pa arthas ajīvati yastvāt marati re vasyāt ātmatriptas ca mānavah ātman ye vachas anthush taha tasyakāryam na viddhya te naiva tasyakrite nārthaha
nākrte ne ha kashchana nachās yasarva bhūtēshu kashchidarthav vyapāśrayaha tasmāt asaktas satatam kārjam karma samācara asaktoh yācaran karma parama apnoti pūrushah karma nai vahi sam siddhim
āsthita jan kādaya ha lokasangraha me vāpi sampaśyan kartu marhasi yajñāt ācara tishreṣṭha ha tattade veta ro jan ha sa yad pramanam kurute lokas tadanuvartate
name pārthāstikarthav yam trushu lokeshu kīngchana nānavāptama vāptav yam vartā eva chakarmani yadihya hamna vartēya
jātukar mannyatandrita ha māma vartmanuvartante manuśyāv pārthasarvaśah ha utsi deyuri me lokāha nakuryāṁ karma jedaḥṃ sankar asya chakarthāśyāṁ upahanyāmi māf prajāha
saktaḥ karmañya vidvāṁ sahā yatha kurvanti bārata kurjād vidvāṁ statha saktaḥ chikir shurloka sangraham
nā buddhi vedam janayet ājñā nāam karma sangināṁ josha yet sarva karmaṇi vidvāṁ yuk tassam ācaran
prakṛtekh kriyamanāni gunaykh karmaṇi sarvaśah āhankāravi mūdhātmā kartāham iti mannyate tattva vidtum aha bhāho gunakarmavi bhāgayoho
gunā guneshu vartante iti matvāna sajjate prakṛteh guna sammūdhāha sajjante guna karma su tāna krītsna vidomandaṁ krītsna vinnavi cālayet
māyisarvaṇi karmaṇi san yas yādhyātmā chetasa nirāśir nirmamo bhūtvā yodhyasvavigata jvarah jyēme matamidam nityam ānūtashthanti mānavāha
śraddhā vantona suyantaha mūchi ante te pikarma bhi hi yētve tadabhyasu yantaha nānūtashthanti mēmatam sarva gnyāna vi mūdhām stāna vidhīnaśtāna chetasa ha sādrīśam cēṣṭate svasyāha
prakṛteh gnyāna vāna pe prakṛteṁ yānti bhūtāni nigrahaḥ kim kārśyati indriyasi yendriyasi yārthe
rāgad dveshau vyavasthitau tayo navaśa māgat chet tau hi yasya paripanti nau śreyān svadharmo vīgunaha
paradhar māt svanshthītāt svadharmenidha namśreyāha
paradhar mo bhayāvaha arjuna uvājā atha kena prayukto yam pāpam carati pūrushaha
ani channa pivārśneya balādivani yōjitaha śrī bhagavānuvāj kāma eśakro dhā eśaha
rājogunasa mudhavaha mahāśanomāha pāpāma vidhienami havairenam
dhume nāvriyate van hi hi yathā darshom alena ca yathol benavrto garbha
tathā te nedam āvratam āvratam nyanamete na nyaninonitya vairina
kāma rūpena kaunteya dhushpūrenā na lenaccha
indriyāṇi mano buddhi he asyādheśthā na mūcchīyate
etair vimohayateśaha nyanam āvratya dehinam
tasmātva mindriyānyādau niyam yabharatarshabhā
pāpāmanam prajahi yenam njāna vidhnyāna nāśanam
indriyāni parānyāho ho indriye bhyaf paramanah
manasastu para buddhi he yobuddhev paratastu sahā
evam buddhev param buddhvā samstabhyātmā namātmāna
jaiṣatrum māhābāho kāma rūpaṁ durāsadam
om tatsaditi śrīmad bhagavadgītāsu upanishatsu
brahmāvidhya yā yoga śāstra śrī krṣṇārjuna samvāde
karma yoga nāmā trti yodhyāyāha
